sn45.13:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. Then a certain bhikkhu approached the Blessed One … . Sitting to one side, that bhikkhu said to the Blessed One:
sn45.13:1.2: "Venerable sir, it is said, ‘a trainee, a trainee.’ In what way is one a trainee?"
sn45.13:1.3:
2
"Here, bhikkhu, one possesses a trainee's right view … a trainee's right concentration. It is in this way that one is a trainee."
